# NextGen Study Hub

> NextGen Study Hub is an educational website for Indian diploma and engineering students.

## Primary Sections

- [Diploma Engineering Notes](https://www.atulsharmas.in/notes-library): Semester-wise notes, assignments, practical files and exam-focused study materials.
- [Student Blog](https://www.atulsharmas.in/blog): Study tips, exam preparation guides, programming roadmaps, career advice and government exam resources.
- [Student Articles](https://www.atulsharmas.in/articles): Detailed learning guides and productivity resources.
- [Student Tools](https://www.atulsharmas.in/student-tools): CGPA calculator, study timer, AI study tools, quiz practice and timetable tools.
- [Jobs and Internships](https://www.atulsharmas.in/jobs): Internship, fresher and career opportunity listings for students.

## Core Topics

- Diploma engineering notes
- DBMS notes, MCQ questions and interview questions
- C, Java and Python programming notes
- Data structures, operating systems and computer networks
- Semester exam preparation
- CGPA, GPA and study productivity tools
- Internships and career guidance for students

## Site Owner

NextGen Study Hub was created by Atul Sharma to help students access organized academic resources and practical learning tools.
